---
title: "ONT_sim"
author: "Mona Taouk"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)

data <- read.csv("results/all_tools_stats.tsv", sep = "\t")

data$Identity_Qscore <- -10 * log10(1 - data$actual_identity)
data$Identity_Qscore <- pmin(data$Identity_Qscore, 50)

data <- data %>%
  mutate(tool = recode(
    tool,
    "simlord" = "SimLoRD",
    "real_reads" = "Real reads"
  ))

df_Badread <- data %>% filter(tool == "Badread")
df_LongISLND <- data %>% filter(tool == "LongISLND")
df_lrsim <- data %>% filter(tool == "lrsim")
df_NanoSim <- data %>% filter(tool == "NanoSim")
df_PBSIM3 <- data %>% filter(tool == "PBSIM3")
df_SimLoRD <- data %>% filter(tool == "SimLoRD")
df_Real_reads <- data %>% filter(tool == "Real reads")
```

```{r colours}
badread_colour <- "#00b0be"
longislnd_colour <- "#8fd7d7"
lrsim_colour <- "#f45f74"
nanosim_colour <- "#ff8cae"
pbsim3_colour <- "#98c127"
simlord_colour <- "#bdd373"
real_reads_colour <- "#ffb255"
reference_line_colour <- "grey70"
point_colour <- "#00b0be"

simulator_colours <- c(
  "Badread" = badread_colour,
  "LongISLND" = longislnd_colour,
  "lrsim" = lrsim_colour,
  "NanoSim" = nanosim_colour,
  "PBSIM3" = pbsim3_colour,
  "SimLoRD" = simlord_colour
)
```

```{r themes}
histogram_panel_theme <- theme_bw() + theme(
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
  plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
  panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
)

histogram_hidden_x_theme <- histogram_panel_theme + theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "white", angle = 45, hjust = 1),
  axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white")
)

histogram_visible_x_theme <- histogram_panel_theme + theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
)

scatter_panel_theme <- theme_bw() + theme(
  plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white")
)

scatter_hidden_x_theme <- scatter_panel_theme + theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "white", angle = 45, hjust = 1),
  axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "white")
)

scatter_hidden_x_hidden_y_theme <- scatter_hidden_x_theme + theme(
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
)

scatter_visible_x_theme <- scatter_panel_theme + theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
)

scatter_visible_x_hidden_y_theme <- scatter_visible_x_theme + theme(
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
)

supplementary_facet_theme <- theme_bw() + theme(
  legend.position = "none",
  strip.background = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
)

supplementary_facet_no_y_grid_theme <- supplementary_facet_theme + theme(
  panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
)

supplementary_calibration_theme <- theme_bw() + theme(
  legend.position = "none",
  strip.background = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
)

supplementary_real_calibration_theme <- theme_bw() + theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
  plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9),
  strip.background = element_blank()
)
```

```{r}
plot_Badread <- ggplot(df_Badread, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = badread_colour) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Badread") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme

plot_LongISLND <- ggplot(df_LongISLND, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = longislnd_colour) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "LongISLND") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme

plot_lrsim <- ggplot(df_lrsim, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = lrsim_colour) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Count", title = "lrsim") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme

plot_NanoSim <- ggplot(df_NanoSim, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = nanosim_colour) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "NanoSim") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme

plot_PBSIM3 <- ggplot(df_PBSIM3, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = pbsim3_colour) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "PBSIM3") +
  histogram_visible_x_theme

plot_SimLoRD <- ggplot(df_SimLoRD, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = simlord_colour) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  labs(x = "Read length (bp)", y = "", title = "SimLoRD") +
  histogram_visible_x_theme

plot_real <- ggplot(df_Real_reads, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = real_reads_colour) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Real reads") +
  histogram_visible_x_theme

figure_1 <- (
  (plot_Badread + plot_LongISLND + plot_spacer()) / 
  (plot_lrsim + plot_NanoSim + plot_real) /
  (plot_PBSIM3 + plot_SimLoRD + plot_spacer())) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Read length distribution for each simulation tool")

ggsave(
  "figures/figure_1.pdf",
  figure_1,
  height  = 160,
  width = 200,
  units  = "mm",
  device = "pdf"
)

figure_1
```

```{r}
plot_Badread <- ggplot(df_Badread, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = badread_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Badread") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme

plot_LongISLND <- ggplot(df_LongISLND, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = longislnd_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "LongISLND") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme

plot_lrsim <- ggplot(df_lrsim, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = lrsim_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Count", title = "lrsim") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme

plot_NanoSim <- ggplot(df_NanoSim, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = nanosim_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "NanoSim") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme

plot_PBSIM3 <- ggplot(df_PBSIM3, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = pbsim3_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "PBSIM3") +
  histogram_visible_x_theme

plot_SimLoRD <- ggplot(df_SimLoRD, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = simlord_colour) +
  labs(
    x = "Mean identity-derived quality score (per read)",
    y = "",
    title = "SimLoRD"
  ) +
  histogram_visible_x_theme

plot_real <- ggplot(df_Real_reads, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = real_reads_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Real reads") +
  histogram_visible_x_theme

figure_2 <- (
  (plot_Badread + plot_LongISLND + plot_spacer()) / 
  (plot_lrsim + plot_NanoSim + plot_real) /
  (plot_PBSIM3 + plot_SimLoRD + plot_spacer())) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Mean identity-derived quality score per read for each tool")

ggsave(
  "figures/figure_2.pdf",
  figure_2,
  height  = 160,
  width = 200,
  units  = "mm",
  device = "pdf"
)

figure_2
```

```{r}
plot_Badread <- ggplot(df_Badread, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = badread_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Badread") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_LongISLND <- ggplot(df_LongISLND, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = longislnd_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "LongISLND") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_lrsim <- ggplot(df_lrsim, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = lrsim_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Count", title = "lrsim") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_NanoSim <- ggplot(df_NanoSim, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = nanosim_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "NanoSim") +
  histogram_hidden_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_PBSIM3 <- ggplot(df_PBSIM3, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = pbsim3_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "PBSIM3") +
  histogram_visible_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_SimLoRD <- ggplot(df_SimLoRD, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = simlord_colour) +
  labs(x = "Mean quality score (per read)", y = "", title = "SimLoRD") +
  histogram_visible_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_real <- ggplot(df_Real_reads, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.95, position = "identity", fill = real_reads_colour) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Real reads") +
  histogram_visible_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

figure_3 <- (
  (plot_Badread + plot_LongISLND + plot_spacer()) / 
  (plot_lrsim + plot_NanoSim + plot_real) /
  (plot_PBSIM3 + plot_SimLoRD + plot_spacer())) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Mean quality score for each tool")

ggsave(
  "figures/figure_3.pdf",
  figure_3,
  height  = 160,
  width = 200,
  units  = "mm",
  device = "pdf"
)

figure_3
```

```{r}
plot_Badread <- ggplot(df_Badread, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = point_colour, fill = point_colour, size = 0.5 ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Badread") +
  scatter_hidden_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_LongISLND <- ggplot(df_LongISLND, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = point_colour, fill = point_colour, size = 0.5 ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "LongISLND") +
  scatter_hidden_x_hidden_y_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_lrsim <- ggplot(df_lrsim, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = point_colour, fill = point_colour, size = 0.5 ) +
  labs(x = "",  y = "Mean identity-derived\nquality score (per read)", title = "lrsim") +
  scatter_hidden_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_NanoSim <- ggplot(df_NanoSim, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = point_colour, fill = point_colour, size = 0.5 ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "NanoSim") +
  scatter_hidden_x_hidden_y_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_PBSIM3 <- ggplot(df_PBSIM3, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = point_colour, fill = point_colour, size = 0.5 ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "PBSIM3") +
  scatter_visible_x_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_SimLoRD <- ggplot(df_SimLoRD, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = point_colour, fill = point_colour, size = 0.5 ) +
  labs(x = "Mean quality score (per read)", y = "", title = "SimLoRD") +
  scatter_visible_x_hidden_y_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

plot_real <- ggplot(df_Real_reads, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = point_colour, fill = point_colour, size = 0.5 ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Real reads") +
  scatter_visible_x_hidden_y_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50))

figure_4 <- (
  (plot_Badread + plot_LongISLND + plot_spacer()) / 
  (plot_lrsim + plot_NanoSim + plot_real) /
  (plot_PBSIM3 + plot_SimLoRD + plot_spacer())) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Mean identitiy derived quality score vs empicrical quality score for each tool")

ggsave(
  "figures/figure_4.pdf",
  figure_4,
  height  = 160,
  width = 200,
  units  = "mm",
  device = "pdf"
)

figure_4
```

```{r}

files <- tribble(
  ~tool,        ~file,
  "Real reads", "results/real.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "Badread",    "results/Badread.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "LongISLND",  "results/LongISLND.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "lrsim",      "results/lrsim.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "NanoSim",    "results/NanoSim.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "PBSIM3",     "results/PBSIM3.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "simlord",    "results/simlord.qscore_counts.tsv"
)

per_base <- files %>%
  mutate(data = map(file, ~ read_tsv(.x, show_col_types = FALSE))) %>%
  unnest(data) %>%
  mutate(
    all_errors   = mismatch + insertion + deletion,
    total        = all_errors + match,
    error_rate   = all_errors / total,
    error_qscore = -10 * log10(error_rate)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(total) & total > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    tool = factor(
      tool,
      levels = c("Real reads", setdiff(unique(tool), "Real reads"))
    )
  )

max_q <- max(per_base$qscore, na.rm = TRUE)

per_base <- per_base %>%
  mutate(tool = recode(
    tool,
    "simlord" = "SimLoRD",
    "real_reads" = "Real reads"
  ))

per_base_sim <- per_base %>% filter(tool != "Real reads")
per_base_real <- per_base %>% filter(tool == "Real reads")
```

```{r}
# Plot for the six simulation tools
p_sim_correct <- ggplot(per_base_sim, aes(x = qscore, y = match)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = tool), width = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y", nrow = 3) +
  labs(x = "Q score", y = "", title = "A. Correct base Q score histogram") +
  supplementary_facet_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), expand = expansion(add = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = simulator_colours)

# Plot for real reads with a fake facet label on top
p_real_correct <- ggplot(per_base_real, aes(x = qscore, y = match)) +
  geom_col(fill = real_reads_colour, width = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y", nrow = 3) +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  supplementary_facet_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), expand = expansion(add = 1))

# Combine: sim facets on left, real reads + blank on right stacked
right_col <- (plot_spacer() / p_real_correct / plot_spacer()) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.73, 0.77, 0.50))

A <- (p_sim_correct | right_col) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(2, 1))
```

```{r}
# Plot for the six simulation tools
p_sim_error <- ggplot(per_base_sim, aes(x = qscore, y = all_errors)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = tool), width = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y", nrow = 3) +
  labs(x = "Q score", y = "Count", title = "B. Error base Q score histogram") +
  supplementary_facet_no_y_grid_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), expand = expansion(add = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = simulator_colours)

# Plot for real reads with a fake facet label on top
p_real_error <- ggplot(per_base_real, aes(x = qscore, y = all_errors)) +
  geom_col(fill = real_reads_colour, width = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y", nrow = 3) +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  supplementary_facet_no_y_grid_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), expand = expansion(add = 1))

# Combine: sim facets on left, real reads + blank on right stacked
right_col <- (plot_spacer() / p_real_error / plot_spacer()) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.73, 0.77, 0.50))

B <- (p_sim_error | right_col) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(2, 1))
```

```{r}
p_sim_cal <- ggplot(per_base_sim, aes(x = qscore, y = error_qscore)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", colour = reference_line_colour) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = tool), alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free", nrow = 3) +
  labs(x = "Actual Q score", y = "Identity derived Q score", title = "C. Per-base Q score calibration") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max_q)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max_q)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = simulator_colours) +
  supplementary_calibration_theme

p_real_cal <- ggplot(per_base_real, aes(x = qscore, y = error_qscore)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", colour = reference_line_colour) +
  geom_point(colour = real_reads_colour, alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max_q)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max_q)) +
  supplementary_real_calibration_theme +
  ggtitle("Real reads")

right_col_cal <- (plot_spacer() / p_real_cal / plot_spacer()) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.71, 0.50, 0.50))

C <- (p_sim_cal | right_col_cal) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(2, 1))


```

```{r, fig.height= 14, fig.width= 7}
supplementary_1 <- A/B/C

ggsave(
  "figures/figure_s1.pdf",
  supplementary_1,
  height  = 400,
  width = 200,
  units  = "mm",
  device = "pdf"
)

supplementary_1
```
